svg.text: ​marques@lucas​——————​OS: Arch Linux, iOS​Uptime: 19 years, 8 months, 13 days​Certifications: Oracle Data Management Foundations, RU330: Redis​Kernel: Bachelor's Degree in Software Engineering​IDE: VsCode 1.85.0, WebStorm 2023.3.1, StackBlitz, Repl.it​Backend.Tech: Node JS, PHP, MySQL, MongoDB, Python​Frontend.Tech: React JS, Tailwind, JS(w/TS), HTML, CSS(w/Sass)​Languages.Real: English, Portuguese​Other.Tools: Docker, AWS, Azure, Ansible, Firebase, Ngrok, WSL​D.Skills: Normalization & Modeling (DB), UI/UX, Figma, Pentesting​Contact:​——————​Email: marqueslucasag@gmail.com​Figma, Medium, Reddit: @marquesag​Telegram: @marr9ques​Articles on Medium.com:​——————​"Bun vs Node JS: Uma análise necessária" | https://bit.ly/3teoBsu​"A diferença entre os tipos de Kernel Linux..." | https://bit.ly/489nWr8​
